title: Safe Health Nitrile Disposable Gloves Small Latex Free, Powder Free, Textured, 3.5 mil, Industrial, Food Safe, Janitorial, Tattoo, Law Enforcement, Pet Care, Service, Cleaning, S Blue (Case of 1000)
features: SafeHealth nitrile disposable gloves are ideal for food processing, preparing, manufacturing, and treating.
Versatile Use: SafeHealth nitrile gloves offer elasticity, durability, and comfort. Ideal for bakers, beauticians, tattoo artists, delivery personnel, and daily protection.
EXCELLENT PUNCTURE RESISTANCE: New proprietary slim formulation provides comfort and delivers excellent tactile sensitivity and superior strength in puncture resistance.
Flexible & Precise Fit: SafeHealth Nitrile gloves combine elasticity and comfort, reducing fatigue during extended wear. Textured fingertips enhance grip and precision.

LATEX-FREE & POWDER-FREE: Our gloves are the safest choice for those who have allergic reactions or sensitive skin to latex. Ambidextrous and offer a stretchy & comfy fit for both men and women. Available in small, medium, large, and extra-large sizes.
description: Product Description Discover the benefits of SafeHealth disposable nitrile gloves in various areas In the beauty industry Perfect for manicures, pedicures, beauty treatments and tattooing In the catering and hospitality sector Ideal for avoiding direct contact with ingredients and ensuring hygienic handling Practical for handling hot or cold dishes to ensure food safety Perfect for washing dishes and cleaning In the workshops Perfect for DIY, e.g. screwdriving and repairs Suitable for working with oils and fats Ideal for handling chemicals Tire changing practices With the excellent elasticity, the nitrile gloves allow your hands to conduct business nimbly. You could wear the gloves for a long time thanks to the strong durability of SafeHealth gloves. Textured Fingertips Textured fingertip design ensures a secure, confident grip. Additionally, SafeHealth nitrile gloves offer tactile sensitivity. What do SafeHealth nitrile gloves offer you? Perfect grip, flexibility and resistance With SafeHealth nitrile gloves, you get a secure grip and optimal flexibility. Our gloves offer excellent elasticity and long-lasting resistance. With our innovative slim formulation, you'll experience excellent tactile feel and superior puncture protection. Choose SafeHealth for your daily protection needs and experience the difference. Food safe Latex and powder free 100 and 1000 pieces per box (S,M,L); 90 and 900 pieces per box (XL) Why should you rely on SafeHealth nitrile gloves? Protective Barrier SafeHealth nitrile gloves are an ideal protective barrier for professionals. They are easy to put on and take off. Textured fingertips also allow for greater precision control. Besides, the royal blue color reduces eye fatigue caused by long-term wearing. Reliable Quality SafeHealth disposable gloves allow you to raise the level of daily protection and save money at the same time. Known for its elastic, strong and durable characters, nitrile gloves can serve well in many daily life situations, such as food preparation and cleaning work, etc. For All Trades They are very multifunctional and well used in a variety of professions: cleaners, law enforcement, food sellers, painters, hairdressers for hair coloring, pet care, as well as for home improvement or general use.
